scripts.start: npm run setup-db && npx concurrently -n "DB,BACKEND,FRONTEND,MIS" -c "magenta,blue,green,yellow" "npm run db" "npm run backend" "npm run frontend" "npm run mis"
scripts.setup-db: D:\JSW\mariadb\bin\mysql.exe -u root -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS school_db;" || echo Database already exists or server not running (this is fine if it is the first time)
scripts.backend: ping 127.0.0.1 -n 6 > nul && cd Backend && java -jar target\backend-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar
